description_long: This combat tactical vehicle is a robust, eight-wheeled armored carrier with a low, angular profile and a desert camouflage paint scheme. The vehicle features a prominent turret mounted on the roof, equipped with a visible machine gun and additional sensor or targeting modules. The body is covered in thick, sloped armor plating, providing full coverage from front to rear, with reinforced sections around the turret and sides. The front of the vehicle displays three large exhaust ports and a central headlight, while the rear is equipped with additional lights and what appears to be a rear hatch. The wheels are large, rugged, and designed for off-road mobility, each with deep treads for enhanced traction. The overall design suggests a focus on survivability, mobility, and firepower in urban or desert environments.
description: A heavily armored, eight-wheeled combat vehicle with a turret-mounted machine gun and desert camouflage, designed for tactical operations. Its sloped armor, rugged tires, and reinforced body emphasize protection and mobility.
description_view_0: Side view showing the eight large, rugged wheels, sloped armor, and the turret with mounted weaponry on the roof.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the three exhaust ports, central headlight, and the forward-facing turret with visible weapon mounts.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the wheel and armor layout, with clear visibility of the turret and side modules.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the rear lights, hatch, and the back of the turret, as well as the symmetrical wheel arrangement.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One turret-mounted machine gun on the roof, with additional sensor or targeting modules adjacent to the main weapon.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped armor plating; reinforced sections around the turret and sides; no visible modular or reactive panels.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Desert camouflage with alternating tan and brown angular stripes in a blocky pattern.
attribute_tire_type: Eight large, off-road tires with deep tread patterns for enhanced traction; no visible reinforcement or chains.
